---
title: "About | Acerca de"
description: |
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

# Iván de Luna

👨‍🎓 B.A. Finance (Tec de Monterrey) | M.Sc. International Finance (HWR Berlin) | Doctor of Business Administration (UAdeC) | Specialty in Statistical Methods (CIMAT)

👀 Interests: Finance, Statistics, Economics, ML/AI, Data Science, Regional Development, Governance, Entrepreneurship

💼 Information Systems Manager | Data Science and Finance Lecturer | Business Intelligence Consultant

📫 Twitter: @idelunaa | GitHub: @ivandeluna

*Opinions are my own.*
